# `formatHelp`

Generated reference page for the `formatHelp` function export.

- Import: `dreamcli`

## Signatures

```ts
function formatHelp(schema: CommandSchema, options?: HelpOptions): string;
```

| Parameter | Type                    | Description                              |
| --------- | ----------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| `schema`  | `schema: CommandSchema` | The command schema to render help for.   |
| `options` | `options?: HelpOptions` | Formatting options (width, binary name). |

## Examples
